datasets.name: Synthetic ABA Fraud Dataset
datasets.description: ML-generated dataset modeled on OIG audit findings. 500 providers, 50K claims, ~9.5% fraud rate.

datasets.name: LEIE Exclusion List (HHS-OIG)
datasets.description: Official government list of individuals/entities excluded from federal healthcare programs. Ground-truth fraud labels.

datasets.name: CMS Medicare Provider Data
datasets.description: Medicare claims data by NPI and HCPCS code. Filter by 97151-97158 for ABA therapy.

datasets.name: T-MSIS Analytic Files (Medicaid Claims)
datasets.description: Gold standard Medicaid claims data. Contains all ABA claims across all states. Requires DUA application.
